title: (fix): Resolved the missing steps in the workflow for the backfill to work in quest.
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Retroactive Questing
gist.blurb: Updated our GitHub workflows to automatically backfill existing Pollen Quest issues into the right project columns. Now every quest is properly tracked and ready for action!
gist.summary: Updated the issue-quest-gate GitHub workflow to include a backfill option that automatically categorizes existing POLLEN-QUEST issues into the correct project status.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now easily sync older quest issues into the project board, ensuring no contributor rewards or tasks slip through the cracks.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about organizing 'quests' (issues) into a project board (columns/status). Visual metaphor: The bee mascot and the robot organizing a quest board or sorting scrolls/tasks into different bins.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing glowing quest scrolls onto a wooden notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
